198.reason: [Error: When a single '&' is encountered, the token should be added as a single '&' character, not as "&&". The code incorrectly adds a "&&" token even when the next character is not '&'.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: When a single '&' is encountered, the token should be added as a single '&' character, not as "&&". The code incorrectly adds a "&&" token even when the next character is not '&'.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: When a single '&' is encountered, the token should be added as a single '&' character, not as "&&". The code incorrectly adds a "&&" token even when the next character is not '&'.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Incorrectly adds a token for "&&" when only a single '&' is seen. Should not add a token for the invalid symbol, or should add a token representing the single '&' (but such token type does not exist). This causes the lexer to output an erroneous token for an erroneous program.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Error: Should not add token for "&&" when only a single '&' is present; this incorrectly creates a token for the combined operator instead of handling the single '&' error.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Incorrect token value "&&" for a single '&' error; should be "&"
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Incorrectly assigns "&&" as the token value for a single '&' error; it should be "&" to preserve the actual erroneous character.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly adds "&&" token even when only a single '&' is present; should not add any valid token for a single '&', only report error]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly adds "&&" as token even when only a single '&' is present; should not add any AND token and only report error]

208.reason: [Error: When a single '|' is encountered, the token should be added as a single '|' character, not as "||". The code incorrectly adds a "||" token even when the next character is not '|'.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: When a single '|' is encountered, the token should be added as a single '|' character, not as "||". The code incorrectly adds a "||" token even when the next character is not '|'.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: When a single '|' is encountered, the token should be added as a single '|' character, not as "||". The code incorrectly adds a "||" token even when the next character is not '|'.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Same issue: incorrectly adds a token for "||" when only a single '|' is seen.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Error: Same issue as above – should not add token for "||" when only a single '|' is present.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Incorrect token value "||" for a single '|' error; should be "|"
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Incorrectly assigns "||" as the token value for a single '|' error; it should be "|" to preserve the actual erroneous character.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly adds "||" token even when only a single '|' is present; should not add any valid token for a single '|', only report error]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly adds "||" as token even when only a single '|' is present; should not add any OR token and only report error]

150.reason: Violates the requirement to preserve the exact string representation of numerical values; Integer.parseInt strips leading zeros and alters the original format.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Violates the requirement to preserve the exact string representation of numerical values; Integer.parseInt strips leading zeros and alters the original format.
